hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
INPUT=$(cat)
if [ "$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active')" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi

# Check if any code was edited this session
CHANGED=$(cd /Users/claudia/Desktop/olybuddy-dashboard && git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | head -5)
if [ -z "$CHANGED" ]; then exit 0; fi

# Run TypeScript check
TSC=$(/Users/claudia/Desktop/olybuddy-dashboard/node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --project /Users/claudia/Desktop/olybuddy-dashboard/tsconfig.json 2>&1)
if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
  echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "TypeScript errors found: '"$(echo $TSC | head -3 | tr '\n' ' ')"'"}'
  exit 1
fi

exit 0
